# César Ballardini — katra.ballardini.com.ar

<!-- Standard: https://llmstxt.org/ -->

> Personal blog and professional profile of César Ballardini — Senior Software Developer, System Architect, and Educator with 35+ years of experience in software development, infrastructure engineering, and university teaching. Bilingual site in Spanish (primary, default) and English. Blog posts cover computing history, programming languages, software engineering philosophy, operating systems, and the history of AI — written for an experienced technical audience.

The site is a Hugo blog using the Ananke theme, hosted on GitHub Pages. It covers professional consulting services, a full CV/résumé, technical skill keywords, and Spanish-language blog posts on software development, system administration, programming languages, and computing history. The English section holds professional pages (CV, consulting, skills); blog posts are Spanish-only for now.

César currently works as part of the development team at NewGrid, doing backend and frontend development on an analysis platform that power systems engineers use to identify grid reconfigurations — work that has contributed to over $100 million in annual customer savings in the U.S. Midwest.

## Professional Pages (English)

- [CV](https://katra.ballardini.com.ar/en/cv/): Full curriculum vitae — experience, education, achievements, and skills
- [Consulting](https://katra.ballardini.com.ar/en/consulting/): Consulting services offered — custom software, infrastructure automation, system integration, technical training
- [Skill Keywords](https://katra.ballardini.com.ar/en/skills/): Categorized index of technical skills — programming, frontend, backend, databases, infrastructure, cloud, energy sector, teaching

## Páginas Profesionales (Español)

- [CV](https://katra.ballardini.com.ar/cv/): Currículum vitae completo — experiencia, educación, logros y habilidades
- [Consultoría](https://katra.ballardini.com.ar/consultoria/): Servicios de consultoría — desarrollo de software, automatización de infraestructura, integración de sistemas, capacitación técnica
- [Habilidades Técnicas](https://katra.ballardini.com.ar/habilidades/): Índice categorizado de habilidades técnicas

## Blog (Español)

- [Blog](https://katra.ballardini.com.ar/): Artículos sobre desarrollo de software, administración de sistemas, lenguajes de programación, filosofía de la ingeniería del software, historia del cómputo e historia de la IA

## Contact

- [Email](mailto:cesar.ballardini@gmail.com): cesar.ballardini@gmail.com
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cesar-ballardini/): Professional profile
- [GitHub](https://github.com/CesarBallardini): Open source projects and repositories

## Optional

- [Source repository](https://github.com/CesarBallardini/CesarBallardini.github.io): Full Hugo source for this site, including content, theme configuration, and editorial planning system
- [Editorial roadmap](https://github.com/CesarBallardini/CesarBallardini.github.io/blob/master/content/just-ideas-for-future-posts/near-future-posts.md): Master catalog of over 180 planned post ideas across 11 thematic series — classic languages, Lisp family, recursion and functional CS, software engineering philosophy, computing pioneers, personal CS memoir, IaC and devops, legacy systems archaeology, local computing memory (Argentine/LATAM context), lateral nerd curiosities, and life topics. Each idea has its own draft file under a category folder. Not rendered to the live site but visible in the public repo
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/CesarBallardini/CesarBallardini.github.io/blob/master/CLAUDE.md): Project instructions for Claude Code — git rules (no repo-mutating commands), build commands, content conventions, editorial planning system, and architecture
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/CesarBallardini/CesarBallardini.github.io/blob/master/AGENTS.md): Instructions for AI coding agents working on this repository — git rules, build, content, architecture, and editorial planning
